variants: Jovana Milic, a native of Newtunnel Bridge, currently works at Atlas Drift Automation, where she leverages her proficiency in the Arabic language. After completing her studies at the Lionmane Institute, she was well-prepared to enter her professional field. Beyond her career, Jovana dedicates considerable time to the Ambassador Fields Federation, where she participates in various civic activities aimed at community improvement. Her background in language and active civic engagement enhances her capabilities both at work and in her volunteer pursuits.
